{{Quote|Justice postponed is too often justice ignored.|Dx'ono|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Ghic Dx'ono''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ishori]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented [[Isht]] and the [[Ishori Confederene]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], in the course of [[Caamas Document Crisis]], Senator Ghic Dx'ono and his people aided [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], a member of the High Council, in meeting with the [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] delegation. Soon after his present political opponents, the Diamalia [[Porolo Miatamia]], with a frightening message to the Senate, revealed that the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] had survived his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. Dx 'ono was concerned of Thrawn's return and raised issues that had to be questioned.

{{Char-stub}}
